label: Biological intelligence
description: Mechanisms where cells, tissues, organs, or organisms retain state and convert signals into later phenotype or repair.
state_words: retained cellular, bioelectric, immune, or developmental state
input_words: morphogen, metabolite, electrical, mechanical, immune, or neural signal
boundary_words: membrane, tissue niche, wound boundary, organoid compartment, or assay boundary
cell type, niche, compartment, or assay boundary
output_words: phenotype, migration, secretion, repair, morphology, or fate response
fate, expression pattern, phenotype, or secretion
validation_words: same input with altered tissue context
same input with altered tissue boundary
same final state with different history
